name: Pasta Primavera - Clipper
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Fava beans (about 1 cup after Shelling)
recipeInstructions:
1. Shell the fava beans.
2. Top and tail the snow peas.
3. Break off the ends of asparagus and cut into 1-inch pieces.
4. Cook fava beans in boiling water for 2-3 minutes. Strain and reserve liquid. Rinse beans to cool them and pop them out of the skins. Reboil the water and boil snow peas for 30 seconds. Drain.
5. Reboil the water and cook asparagus about 2 minutes until just tender.
6. Melt butter in a large pan and add garlic; fry, but do not let brown.
7. Add vegetables and salt & pepper. Cover and set aside.
8. Put noodles in boiling water, turn off heat, and cover. Let sit for 4-5 minutes until noodles are just tender. Stir and drain.
9. Reheat vegetables and add them with juices to noodles. Season with salt & pepper, add parsley.
